creator: zirias@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 214684
update WWW to cc65.gihub.io

I suggest changing WWW in pkg-descr. Although the old official site has a link to the current one, the text there is misleading, saying

> Oliver Schmidt, long time contributor to the libraries is providing support
> for the old version.

This hasn't been correct any more since Oliver Schmidt started releasing new versions.
